intro: Ampelocissus chaffanjonii, also known as Chaffanjon's grape vine, is a species of plant in the grape family native to Madagascar. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
